headline: CVS Health’s Aetna to Pay $117.7 Million to Resolve False Claims Act Allegations
summary: Aetna was accused of submitting false patient diagnosis data for its Medicare Advantage Plan enrollees in order to get higher monthly payments from the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services.

headline: CVS to pay $118M to settle Medicare Advantage fraud allegations
summary: The settlement announced by the Department of Justice on Wednesday comes after federal regulators accused Aetna of submitting inaccurate data to the CMS.
